subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Aqa Mahdi! Thou art my representative in the irrigation of the Blessed Garden. Every drop of that water is the water of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا مهدی تو وکیل من هستی در آبیاری روضه مبارکه هر قطره از آن آب ماء حیات
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
